positive: Detailed pen and ink sketch of a cozy, steaming cup of coffee sitting on a wooden windowsill, looking out at a rainy Parisian street scene. Moody lighting, cross-hatching technique, highly atmospheric, vintage engraving style, sepia tones.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, digital painting, bright colors, clean photo
